answer:
The Gladly API uses token-based Basic Authentication [1]. To authenticate, you must use your Gladly login email as the username and your generated API token as the password [2]. These credentials must be passed via the Authorization HTTP header for all requests, which must be performed over HTTPS [1].

You can generate an API token by navigating to Settings, then selecting API Tokens under the App Developer Tools category [3]. Ensure the user account has at least the API User permission [1][4].

Example using curl:

```bash
curl -u user@organization.com:$GLADLY_API_TOKEN \
https://organization.gladly.com/api/v1/organization
```
